description: iOS-Photos-style React Native photo album with pinch-to-zoom grid, typed TS, local-first storage
playbook: Use this when you want a fresh React Native iOS-Photos-style album app with strict TypeScript, zoomable grid, and local-first storage.

name: Zo Skill Runner
description: Call zo_skill.py to run Zo Computer automations, skills, or chats.
orchestrator_instructions: Use run-skill when you know the exact Zo skill_id and have structured args.
Use run-chat for fuzzy, exploratory, or high-level instructions where Zo should decide which internal skill(s) to run.
Prefer a single concise call per user request; avoid looping or polling.
Never pass user secrets directly; instead refer to stored credentials or vault handles by id.

modes.description: Run a Zo skill by skill_id with optional JSON args.

skill_id.description: Zo skill identifier to execute (e.g. sys.github.create_repo).

args.description: Arbitrary JSON payload passed to the Zo skill.

timeout_seconds.description: Override default timeout in seconds for long-running skills.

ok.description: True if zo_skill.py finished without error.

result.description: Raw JSON returned by the Zo skill (success payload).

error.description: Error message if ok is false.

modes.description: Send a chat-style request to Zo and return the response.

context.description: Lightweight context (ids, references) to pass through.

ok.description: True if Zo returned a valid chat response.

data.description: Any structured data Zo returned alongside the message.
